title: Pronouns | #shorts
full_text: My son, my 11-year-old in school was asked the other day to, you know, if he would like to declare his pronouns. He can do that now. So, he came home and he asked me, he said, "Mom, what should I say are my pronouns?" I said, "You tell them you're Indian. Your pronoun is doctor. [Applause]
